_comment_target: FSDP smoke for legacy_render_variant=v2 (ActionConditionedTembAdapter) AFTER the no-zero-init fix. Per-token render features cross-attend over 8-d (joint+gripper) actions, LayerNorm + out_proj (kaiming-init, NOT zero), ADD to temb_base, time_proj. NO gates anywhere. 10 videos × 3 epochs ≈ 5-8 min wall-clock on 4×GH200. Smoke goals: (1) plumbing runs end-to-end with the patched pipeline+eval, (2) `train/action_adapter_out_proj_norm` grows from kaiming start (≠0), (3) val loss logs every epoch, (4) cross_attn.in_proj_weight drifts from xavier — visible in saved ckpt diagnostic post-run.
_num_frames_note: 17 frames matches the full-run v2 config and the egowm baseline. T_lat=5 post-patch frames × 30×54 spatial = 8100 tokens. Fast enough to smoke 10 videos in ~5 min.
_action_note: 8-d state (joint_position 7 + gripper 1) z-scored against train-split stats. At num_frames=17 the action K/V bank for cross_attn is 17 steps — sufficient to verify per-action signal flows through.
_cache_note: Distinct cache from the full-run v2 cache. Key includes 10-vid CSV + has_actions + num_frames=17. First launch MISSES (~30 sec for 10 videos through the VAE).
_gate_lr_note: v2 has no gates; gate_lr_multiplier is a no-op here.
_val_note: Same 10-scene held-out set used in the full-run v2 config. Val every epoch so the smoke surfaces any val-pass bugs immediately.
